Document:
## New Player Icons In some marine roles, like [textlink="Squad Leader" link="RMCGuideSquadLeader"] or Department Heads, you may find [bold]"NEW"[/bold] icons floating above player heads. These icons indicate someone's experience both in the game overall and the specific role they are in.
Generally speaking, these icons mean the following:
[bold][color=#BF40BF]Purple[/color][/bold] is someone's first time playing that role ever.\n [bold][color=#ff000d]Red[/color][/bold] indicates new both the game and the job.\n [bold][color=#B8B823]Yellow[/color][/bold] indicates new to the game, but has experience in that specific role. You will generally see this in roles like Riflemen, Nurse, etc. \n [bold][color=#008000]Green[/color][/bold] indicates new to the job, but not the game.
These icons disappear once their requirements are no longer met, the requirements are as follows:
[bold][color=#BF40BF]Purple[/color][/bold] specifically means someone with less than one hour in their current role.\n New to the Game means they have [bold]less[/bold] than twenty-five (25) hours of total playtime.\n New to the Job means they have [bold]less[/bold] than ten (10) hours of total playtime in that role.
You should be using these icons to assist new members of the community or know who may need additional guideance should they ask for it. Always remember to at minimum show patience and understanding with new players.\n
Currently, there is a bug at times where no new icon will display when someone has no playtime in a role. If you aren't sure, remember that oftentimes you can use a player's rank to loosely gauge experience (IE: PVT Riflemen, or PFC Corpsmen.).
